title: ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 39.  ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT ACT

PART I.  GENERAL

§2301.  Short Title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Economic Development Act."

Acts 1988, No. 888, §1, eff. July 21, 1988.
